results.title: This Spaceballs viral marketing is getting out of hand [Amusing]
Christopher Nolan On AI & “Odyssey” Backlash
results.description: You’d think filmmaker Christopher Nolan’s “The Odyssey” would be one of the last things to become a target in a culture war – but here we are. Nolan sat down with The Telegraph this week to ask him about the backlash that seems to have originated over the casting choices of two very minor characters [...] The post Christopher Nolan On AI & “Odyssey” Backlash appeared first on Dark Horizons .

results.title: Jason & Kylie Kelce's Daughters Were Travis & Taylor Swift's Flower Girls
results.description: While several details about Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding party are being kept private, a guest has confirmed the flower girls.

results.title: Former NATO commander urges bloc to give Trump 'timeout'
results.description: The members should avoid vexing the US leader in the next two years to avoid breaking the bloc for good, James Stavridis has suggested NATO members should give US President Donald Trump a "timeout" for the rest of his tenure, reducing public exposure and joint endeavors to a bare minimum while working on bols
